messages.content: You output JSON for task plans.

You are a senior project planner producing structured task plans.

Follow this JSON schema:
TaskPlan { originalPrompt: string; subtasks: Subtask[]; totalSubtasks: number; decompositionStrategy?: string }
Subtask { id: string (kebab-case), title: string, description: string (>=10 chars), status: one of pending|in_progress|completed|failed, dependencies: string[], estimatedComplexity: low|medium|high, successCriteria: string }
Constraints: 2-10 subtasks, actionable descriptions, include logical dependencies, avoid circular references, IDs unique.
Original prompt: Framework: Express, Port: 2552, Styling: Tailwind CSS

Original request: Create a minimal hello world app where i can change colors of the text. frontend + backend. 
Clarifications:
- framework: Express
- port: 2552
- styling: Tailwind CSS
Previous validation issues:
None
Respond ONLY with JSON matching the schema.

response:
{
  "originalPrompt": "Framework: Express, Port: 2552, Styling: Tailwind CSS; Create a minimal hello world app where i can change colors of the text. frontend + backend.",
  "subtasks": [
    {
      "id": "init-project",
      "title": "Initialize project and install dependencies",
      "description": "Create a new npm project, add Express and Tailwind toolchain plus dev helpers and create base folders (server and public).",
      "status": "pending",
      "dependencies": [],
      "estimatedComplexity": "medium",
      "successCriteria": "package.json created, node_modules present, folders 'public' and project entry files created and dependencies include express and tailwindcss in package.json"
    },
    {
      "id": "setup-express-server",
      "title": "Create Express server listening on port 2552",
      "description": "Implement server.js that serves static files from /public and starts listening on port 2552 with basic logging.",
      "status": "pending",
      "dependencies": [
        "init-project"
      ],
      "estimatedComplexity": "medium",
      "successCriteria": "server.js starts without errors and visiting http://localhost:2552 returns a 200 (initially a placeholder file from public)"
    },
    {
      "id": "configure-tailwind",
      "title": "Configure Tailwind CSS build",
      "description": "Initialize Tailwind config, PostCSS (or recommended build) and add an input CSS that includes Tailwind directives; set output to public/styles.css.",
      "status": "pending",
      "dependencies": [
        "init-project"
      ],
      "estimatedComplexity": "medium",
      "successCriteria": "tailwind.config.js and postcss configuration exist and running the build script produces public/styles.css containing compiled Tailwind utilities"
    },
    {
      "id": "implement-api-persistence",
      "title": "Add color API endpoints and simple persistence",
      "description": "Add GET /api/color and POST /api/color to Express. Keep selected color in-memory (or optionally a simple JSON file) so the frontend can fetch/save the chosen text color.",
      "status": "pending",
      "dependencies": [
        "setup-express-server"
      ],
      "estimatedComplexity": "low",
      "successCriteria": "GET /api/color returns a JSON color value and POST /api/color accepts JSON { color: \"#rrggbb\" } and updates returned value"
    },
    {
      "id": "create-frontend",
      "title": "Build frontend with Tailwind and color control",
      "description": "Create public/index.html and public/app.js using Tailwind classes. Include a visible 'Hello World' text, a color input (or buttons) to change its color, and client-side code to call the color API.",
      "status": "pending",
      "dependencies": [
        "configure-tailwind",
        "setup-express-server",
        "implement-api-persistence"
      ],
      "estimatedComplexity": "medium",
      "successCriteria": "index.html loads styles.css and app.js, color control changes the text color in the page and calls POST /api/color; on reload the page fetches GET /api/color and applies it"
    },
    {
      "id": "add-build-and-start-scripts",
      "title": "Add npm scripts for build and start",
      "description": "Add scripts to package.json to build Tailwind CSS, start the server, and optionally run a dev workflow (watch + nodemon).",
      "status": "pending",
      "dependencies": [
        "configure-tailwind",
        "setup-express-server"
      ],
      "estimatedComplexity": "low",
      "successCriteria": "npm run build produces public/styles.css and npm start runs the Express server; a single documented command to run the app is available"
    },
    {
      "id": "test-and-verify",
      "title": "Run manual tests and verify functionality",
      "description": "Start build and server, open http://localhost:2552, change the Hello World text color and reload to confirm persistence and correct styling.",
      "status": "pending",
      "dependencies": [
        "create-frontend",
        "implement-api-persistence",
        "add-build-and-start-scripts"
      ],
      "estimatedComplexity": "low",
      "successCriteria": "User can change the Hello World color via the UI, the color change is visible immediately, and a page reload restores the last saved color from the API"
    }
  ],
  "totalSubtasks": 7,
  "decompositionStrategy": "Top-down: initialize project and tooling first, create a minimal Express server to serve static assets, configure Tailwind build, add API endpoints for color persistence, implement the frontend UI that uses Tailwind and the API, add convenient npm scripts, and finish with manual testing and verification."
}
